SourceProxy.label: VESPA Delaunay 2D
SourceProxy.name: VESPADelaunay2D

Documentation.short_help: Create a 2D Delaunay triangulation from points.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter creates planar Delaunay meshes from a set of planar points. Edge and polygon constraints can be specified as vtkPolyData lines and polygons. The input mesh needs to be planar along the x, y or z axis. Constraints should not overlap each other.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Boolean Operation
SourceProxy.name: VESPABooleanOperation

Documentation.short_help: Applies boolean operations on two vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter performs boolean operations between two closed polygonal meshes. These operations include union, intersection, and difference. The resulting mesh is closed.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseAbsoluteThresholds
IntVectorProperty.label: Use absolute thresholds
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Is you want to provide absolute values for Alpha and Offest, check this.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Alpha Wrapping
SourceProxy.name: VESPAAlphaWrapping
SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter remeshes a triangulated vtkPolyData using the CGAL alpha wrapping method.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseAbsoluteThresholds
IntVectorProperty.label: Use absolute thresholds
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Is you want to provide absolute values for Alpha and Offest, check this.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Isotropic Remesher
SourceProxy.name: VESPAIsotropicRemesher
SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter remeshes a triangulated vtkPolyData using the CGAL isotropic_remesh method. Feature edges are protected.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of iterations for the remeshing algorithm.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: ProtectAngle
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Protection Angle
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Angle threshold for feature edges to protect (in degrees).

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Mesh Deformation
SourceProxy.name: VESPAMeshDeformation

Documentation.short_help: Deforms a triangulated vtkPolyData by moving points.

SourceProxy.Documentation:
This filter deforms a surface mesh by moving control points to target positions. Neighboring points contained in a Region of Interest (ROI) may be moved to obtain a smooth deformation.
The filter can take three inputs: - the vtkPolyData mesh to deform with unique IDs for the points - a vtkPointSet with the target positions of the control points, identified by their IDs - a vtkSelection corresponding to the ROI (optional)
If a ROI is not specified, it is defined with the control points. In this case, the control points will simply be moved to their destinations without modifying the rest of the mesh.

InputProperty.name: Source
InputProperty.Documentation: Point set describing the control points and their target positions.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Selection containing the region of interest (points that can be moved).

StringVectorProperty.name: GlobalIdArray
StringVectorProperty.label: Global Point ID Array
StringVectorProperty.Documentation: Input array describing global point IDs.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of iterations used in the deformation process.

IntVectorProperty.name: Tolerance
IntVectorProperty.label: Tolerance
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Tolerance of the energy convergence used in the deformation process. If 0 is specified, no energy criterion is used.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Copy attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be copied unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Mesh Subdivision
SourceProxy.name: VESPAMeshSubdivision

Documentation.short_help: Refines a triangulated vtkPolyData through subdivision.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter performs a surface mesh subdivision by creating new points to refine and smoothen a polygonal mesh. Several subdivision methods are available: - Catmull-Clark based on the PQQ pattern - Loop based on the PTQ pattern - Doo-Sabin based on the DQQ pattern - Sqrt3 based on the Sqrt3 pattern

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Hole Filling
SourceProxy.name: VESPAHoleFilling

Documentation.short_help: Fills a selected hole in a triangulated vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter fills a selected hole (or patch) in a triangulated vtkPolyData using meshing, refining and fairing. Note that if a patch is selected (even without an existing hole), the the selected triangles will be removed first.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Input that provides the selection specifying the patch or hole to fill.

IntVectorProperty.name: FairingContinuity
IntVectorProperty.label: Fairing Continuity
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Value for the tangential continuity of the resulting surface patch. Possible values are 0, 1 and 2, referring to C0, C1 and C2 continuity. Use 0 for planar filling.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Region Fairing
SourceProxy.name: VESPARegionFairing

Documentation.short_help: Fairs a region of a triangulated vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter fairs (smoothes) a selected region of a triangulated vtkPolyData by moving vertices.

InputProperty.name: Selection
InputProperty.Documentation: Input that provides the selection specifying the region to fair.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Interpolate attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be interpolated unto the resulting mesh.

SourceProxy.label: VESPA Shape Smoothing
SourceProxy.name: VESPAShapeSmoothing

Documentation.short_help: Smoothes the shape of a triangulated vtkPolyData.

SourceProxy.Documentation: This filter smoothes the overall shape of a triangulated vtkPolyData using the mean curvature. The degree of smoothing can be controlled using the number of iterations as well as the time step.

IntVectorProperty.name: NumberOfIterations
IntVectorProperty.label: Number Of Iterations
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: Number of iterations for the smoothing algorithm.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: TimeStep
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Time Step
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Time step indicating the smoothing speed. A higher value leads to a faster distortion of the shape. Standard values lie between 1e-6 and 1.

IntVectorProperty.name: UseUpdateAttributes
IntVectorProperty.label: Copy attributes
IntVectorProperty.Documentation: If ON, attributes will be copied unto the resulting mesh.
